references.english: Whoever lies with an animal shall be put to death.
references.matched_snippet: כל שכב עם בהמה מות יומת

references.hebrew: לֹא־תִהְיֶ֥ה קְדֵשָׁ֖ה מִבְּנ֣וֹת יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וְלֹֽא־יִהְיֶ֥ה קָדֵ֖שׁ מִבְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
references.english: No Israelite woman shall be a consecrated worker,hconsecrated worker Or “retainer”; meaning of Heb. qedeshah uncertain. In contrast to others “cult prostitute.” nor shall any Israelite man be a consecrated worker.iconsecrated worker Meaning of Heb. qadesh uncertain. See previous note.

references.hebrew: וְגַם־קָדֵ֖שׁ הָיָ֣ה בָאָ֑רֶץ עָשׂ֗וּ כְּכֹל֙ הַתּוֹעֲבֹ֣ת הַגּוֹיִ֔ם אֲשֶׁר֙ הוֹרִ֣ישׁ יְהֹוָ֔ה מִפְּנֵ֖י בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {פ}
references.english: there were also consecrated workerseconsecrated workers Or “retainers”; meaning of Heb. qadesh uncertain. in the land. [Judah] imitated all the abhorrent practices of the nations that GOD had dispossessed before the Israelites.

commentary_links.hebrew: וְאֶ֨ת־זָכָ֔ר לֹ֥א תִשְׁכַּ֖ב מִשְׁכְּבֵ֣י אִשָּׁ֑ה תּוֹעֵבָ֖ה הִֽוא׃
commentary_links.english: Do not lie with a male as one lies with a woman; it is an abhorrence.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: תשכב משכבי אשה תועבה היא &star למדנו

commentary_links.hebrew: וּבְכׇל־בְּהֵמָ֛ה לֹא־תִתֵּ֥ן שְׁכׇבְתְּךָ֖ לְטׇמְאָה־בָ֑הּ וְאִשָּׁ֗ה לֹֽא־תַעֲמֹ֞ד לִפְנֵ֧י בְהֵמָ֛ה לְרִבְעָ֖הּ תֶּ֥בֶל הֽוּא׃
commentary_links.english: Do not have carnal relations with any animal and defile yourself thereby. Likewise, a woman shall not lend herself to an animal to mate with it; it is perversion.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: רבי ישמעאל אינו ו חייב אלא אחת אידי ואידי לא יהיה קדש הוא ☆ אביי אמר

commentary_links.hebrew: לֹא־תִהְיֶ֥ה קְדֵשָׁ֖ה מִבְּנ֣וֹת יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וְלֹֽא־יִהְיֶ֥ה קָדֵ֖שׁ מִבְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
commentary_links.english: No Israelite woman shall be a consecrated worker,hconsecrated worker Or “retainer”; meaning of Heb. qedeshah uncertain. In contrast to others “cult prostitute.” nor shall any Israelite man be a consecrated worker.iconsecrated worker Meaning of Heb. qadesh uncertain. See previous note.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: יהיה קדש מבני ישראל ואומר וגם קדש היה

commentary_links.hebrew: וְגַם־קָדֵ֖שׁ הָיָ֣ה בָאָ֑רֶץ עָשׂ֗וּ כְּכֹל֙ הַתּוֹעֲבֹ֣ת הַגּוֹיִ֔ם אֲשֶׁר֙ הוֹרִ֣ישׁ יְהֹוָ֔ה מִפְּנֵ֖י בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {פ}
commentary_links.english: there were also consecrated workerseconsecrated workers Or “retainers”; meaning of Heb. qadesh uncertain. in the land. [Judah] imitated all the abhorrent practices of the nations that GOD had dispossessed before the Israelites.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: בארץ עשו ככל התועבת הגוים אשר הוריש

commentary_links.hebrew: וְאִ֗ישׁ אֲשֶׁ֨ר יִתֵּ֧ן שְׁכׇבְתּ֛וֹ בִּבְהֵמָ֖ה מ֣וֹת יוּמָ֑ת וְאֶת־הַבְּהֵמָ֖ה תַּהֲרֹֽגוּ׃
commentary_links.english: If a man has carnal relations with an animal, he shall be put to death; and you shall kill the animal.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: יתן שכבתו בבהמה בין ב גדולה בין קטנה

commentary_links.hebrew: כִּ֤י הָרֹג֙ תַּֽהַרְגֶ֔נּוּ יָ֥דְךָ֛ תִּֽהְיֶה־בּ֥וֹ בָרִֽאשׁוֹנָ֖ה לַהֲמִית֑וֹ וְיַ֥ד כׇּל־הָעָ֖ם בָּאַחֲרֹנָֽה׃
commentary_links.english: but take that person’s life. Let your hand be the first to put them to death, followed by the hand of the rest of the people.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: הרג תהרגנו מה להלן בסקילה אף כאן
